description: This file defines a SplashActivity class used for displaying a splash screen at app startup, which then transitions to PlayActivity after a delay.

classes.name: SplashActivity
classes.description: An Android activity that shows a splash screen and then starts the main play activity after a delay.

methods.name: onCreate
methods.description: Overrides the Activity.onCreate method to initialize the splash screen and set up a delayed transition to the PlayActivity.
